text.style: fill: #262626; font: 700 11px 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle
fill: #262626; font: 8px 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start
fill: #262626; font: 8px 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

path.style: fill: none; stroke: #262626; stroke-width: 0.5; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-linecap: square
